summary: Iteration 14 - DM Ringing feature and Linux Native App skeleton verified. All DM call API endpoints working (start, answer, decline, end). Frontend loads, login works, DMCall component has all required data-testid attributes. audio.js exports all ringing functions. Electron native app files present and valid.
critical_code_review_comments: DMCall.js properly implements ringing UI with all required data-testid attributes
audio.js uses Web Audio API for synthesized ring/dial tones - no external audio files needed
Browser Notification API used for background tab alerts
Electron native app skeleton is complete with main.js, preload.js, package.json, build.sh, README.md
Native app properly handles WebRTC permissions, single instance lock, and system tray
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dm_calls.py (new test file for DM call endpoints)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DM Ringing feature fully implemented. DMCall.js has incoming-call-overlay, outgoing-call-overlay, active-call views with proper data-testid attributes. audio.js exports playRingtone, stopRingtone, playDialtone, stopDialtone. Electron native app at /app/native/linux/ is a wrapper that loads Shield web URL - not bundled with React app.

electron_native_app.main.js: Present - Electron main process with tray, single instance lock, WebRTC permissions
electron_native_app.package.json: Valid - shield-desktop v1.0.0 with electron-builder config
electron_native_app.build.sh: Present - Automated build script for AppImage and deb
electron_native_app.README.md: Present - Documentation for building and running
